name: Chocolate Crinkle Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the sugar and vegetable oil. Mix well.
2. Add the cocoa; blend until combined.
3. Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract.
4. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt; add to the cocoa mixture, blending well.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 6 hours.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F.
7. Shape dough into 1-inch balls. Roll each ball in confectioners' sugar.
8. Place the cookies about 2 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 12 to 14 minutes, or until nearly no indentation remains when touched.
10. Remove from the cookie sheet and cool on a wire rack.
